title: taraxacum nitidiorum
intro: Taraxacum nitidiorum, also known as the shiny dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various ailments. The plant's roots and leaves contain sesquiterpene lactones, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, providing health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting liver function. Taraxacum nitidiorum can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
